title_en: Grass-Fed vs. Grain-Fed Beef: What's on Your Plate?
title_es: Carne de pasto vs. Carne de granja: ¿Qué hay en tu plato?
hook_en: Can you spot the difference in just 2 seconds?
hook_es: ¿Puedes notar la diferencia en solo 2 segundos?
key_message: Grass-fed beef is richer in omega-3s, CLA, and antioxidants, offering significant nutritional benefits over conventional grain-fed beef.
visual_elements: Split screen of a sizzling pan with grass-fed beef on one side and grain-fed beef on the other
Close-up of beef color: deep red vs. pale
Comparison of fat color: yellow vs. white
Text overlay highlighting nutritional differences: omega-3s, CLA, vitamins
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Protein]:
• HEALTHY: 100% grass-fed, grass-finished beef
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Conventional grain-fed feedlot beef (corn, soy, antibiotics, growth hormones)
• KEY FACT: Grass-fed beef has 2-5x more omega-3 fatty acids, higher CLA (conjugated linoleic acid), and more antioxidant vitamins A and E than grain-fed. It also has a healthier omega-6 to omega-3 ratio
• VISUAL IDEA: Show the color difference — deep red grass-fed vs. pale grain-fed. Compare the fat: yellow (beta-carotene from grass) vs. white

title_en: Omega-3s: Unlocking the Secret in Your Steak!
title_es: Omega-3: ¡Descubriendo el secreto en tu bistec!
hook_en: Ever wondered how omega-3s sneak into your beef?
hook_es: ¿Te has preguntado cómo los omega-3 llegan a tu carne?
key_message: Choosing grass-fed beef can significantly boost your intake of omega-3 fatty acids, essential for heart and brain health.
visual_elements: Visual of a bottle of omega-3 pills pouring onto a grass-fed steak
Animation illustrating omega-3's journey from grass to beef
Graphic side-by-side of omega-3 content: grass-fed vs. grain-fed
Quick kitchen tip: how to identify grass-fed beef by its color and fat
